case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. KEVIN ALEXIS GUTIERREZ MONTEJANO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $527.82 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MONTEJANO, KEVIN ALEXIS GUTIERREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
